execution_scenarios.title: Data Loss Crash
execution_scenarios.description: Server failure requires immediate restore, but data retention policy deleted backups.

execution_scenarios.title: License Transfer Crash
execution_scenarios.description: Acquired company attempts to transfer software licenses to parent.

execution_scenarios.title: Liability Cap Crash
execution_scenarios.description: Customer sues for $5M under IP indemnity, but general cap limits all claims to $1M.
